kind.description: Single-word classification. Allowed values include: chinese_oracle_script, chinese_seal_script, turkic_round_rune, geometric_circle, geometric_circle_with_dot, geometric_circle_with_x, geometric_circle_with_cross, geometric_diamond, geometric_diamond_with_dot, geometric_filled_square, geometric_bracket, face_circle_three_dots, math_pi, math_caret, math_asterisk, math_times, latin_print, red_label_stenographic, dash_frac_bar, prime_digit, stick_figure, image, address_hex, unknown.

description.description: Concrete visual description of what you see in this single glyph crop.

position.description: Where on the parent page the glyph is located, e.g. 'centered below the 3x3 cube', 'top-left corner'.

unicode_codepoint.description: Best Unicode match (e.g. U+5929, U+25CB). Empty if you cannot identify.

confidence.description: How confident you are in the kind+description. 1.0 = certain.
